topic: Testosterone in men: 5 things that crash it
caption: Did you know 1 in 4 men over 30 have low testosterone? 🚨 Learn the 5 surprising things that can crash your testosterone levels. 💡 From lack of sleep to excessive drinking, we're breaking it down. 📊 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 👊 #testosteronelife #menshealth #hormonebalance #lowtestosterone #healthyliving
